baseline: Inflation risk elevated. Prefer real assets (GLD, commodities) and TIPS. Shorten duration — TLT headwinds. USD may strengthen. Value over growth; energy/materials over tech.
because_today: Because today Vix Spike is active (value=30.61), heightened risk management is warranted.

Because today unemployment labor conditions is above trend (z=+1.87).

summary: Regime: Overheating (confidence 30%). Inflation risk elevated. Prefer real assets (GLD, commodities) and TIPS. Shorten duration — TLT headwinds. USD may strengthen. Value over growth; energy/materials over tech. Because today Vix Spike is active (value=30.61), heightened risk management is warranted. Because today VIX volatility is extreme (z=+5.50), the VIX signal is significantly elevated versus 2-year norms. Because today 10Y Treasury rate momentum is extreme (z=+3.34), the 10Y Treasury signal is significantly elevated versus 2-year norms.

all_baselines.Goldilocks: Risk-on. Overweight equities, underweight bonds. Carry strategies work well. Prefer cyclicals over defensives. Credit spreads typically tightening — HYG/LQD favorable.
all_baselines.Overheating: Inflation risk elevated. Prefer real assets (GLD, commodities) and TIPS. Shorten duration — TLT headwinds. USD may strengthen. Value over growth; energy/materials over tech.
all_baselines.Stagflation: Most difficult regime for traditional portfolios. Underweight both equities and nominal bonds. Gold and real assets as primary hedge. High-quality defensive equities with pricing power may hold up.
all_baselines.Recession Risk: Flight to safety. Overweight long-duration Treasuries (TLT). Underweight equities and credit (HYG). USD typically strengthens. Reduce risk broadly.
